package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_context_copied_for_sync_path: Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag Gin context Copy calls where work remains synchronous and request-scoped.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule534PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario534Positive(records []Rule534PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
